reviews.review_description:
Exorcism Agency is a blast to play with friends. It’s spooky, intense, and at times freakin’ terrifying! It’s full of those screaming moments that make multi-player horror games so fun. (But seriously, make a quick detour to the bathroom and handle business before playing…could be a wise decision, as my friend soon found out, lol.)

Now, I played with multiple people who have all played Phasmaphobia. I have never played that game, so in turn, had no way to make a comparison. They said the games share some similarities and this definitely reminded them of the other game. So with fresh eyes, I found the atmosphere really worked and the scares are quite good. Take it from me, I run a long-time haunted VR scare experience with live actors every October, so I’m kinda familiar with what really frightens people in this type of immersion. The game uses sound effects and music clips to a very effective level and nails a lot of the tension, shock and suspense in a fun way. 

That said, I did submit some suggestions. A few that would be amazing would be if the game supported six players instead of four. We had more friends who wanted to join, but had to rotate people out, which was kind of frustrating since each session can take a while. We also had a younger person spawn in to our public room when we were waiting for our last friend, so unfortunately, we couldn’t play with him, but he was a newbie and when we play games we like to allow new folks to come along with us and it was just a little unfortunate that we weren’t able to do that with this one. We would’ve been happy to have him join us.

It would also help a lot if we could carry more items and move a little faster, since having to go back and forth to the van eats up a ton of time (especially when you spawn without what you need). A few small tweaks like extra inventory slots and adjustable walking/running speed would make the game even better.

One of my friends who was actually streaming each time we played happened to die first and very quickly the other night and it was unfortunate because being dead…it’s pitch black and you can’t grab a flashlight and you can’t see what’s going on so it made the stream a little less enjoyable that way. He felt that if he would have had the ability to still see what was going on, perhaps with night-vision or maybe with an automatic light attached to him, at least he could have seen what was happening for the stream while getting the visuals of us instead of just getting visuals of these white dots floating around in the dark. It would allow for people who are gone to be able to still enjoy the game and watch their friends get completely freaked out, lol, as well as if they are streaming and taking pictures or something fun like that, they would be able to still have a good visual for YouTube or Twitch. That would make for a great video while providing some fantastic free publicity for the game! See…it’s a win/win! 

Overall, it’s a fun and scary co-op experience that is definitely worth playing. You can play it alone, but if you scare easily, definitely grab the friends. After all, you’re gonna need SOMEONE to run in front of so the creepies don’t go after you! Lol. (Ok just kinddin’…I would NEVER do that….or…would I? Hmmmm…) 🫢

reviews.review_title: So Much Ghost, So Little Time
reviews.review_description: The replay value is through the roof. Just when I think I've seen it all, a new type of ghost with unique abilities appears, forcing me to change my entire strategy. Combined with the vast array of items and equipment to unlock through leveling up, the game constantly offers new goals to pursue. It's a highly addictive cycle of hunting, looting, and improving that is incredibly hard to put down.

developer_response.body: Great. Once you level up you will have more powerful weapon can choose even your skin will help you have better capability. Make it work!

reviews.review_description: Had an issue with the flashlight almost crashing us at the start of the game. Otherwise the game is a blast. Very scary for those who aren't prepared for it. Can't wait to play more!

The private rooms are glitched a little, and if you stand in front of pull doors (specifically in the tutorial room) you’ll clip through the wall, fall through the map, and won’t respawn. 

To play, we made a public instance and joined eachother off of that. Most of everything else went smoothly. Reminds me heavily of phasmophobia and I cant wait to see more ❤️

reviews.review_description: This game reminds me so much of phasmophobia but for quest stand alone. Its a fun game to play with people who get scard and scream because you will brake out lafing so hard. Now the few things id like though is if you died if in ghost form it be nice to have night vision to beable to see since you cant have a flash light and having a better understanding on how we can complete stuff because right now XD i have 0 points and its hard to get more lol but with freinds lest they can help. I so would recomand the game. I have livestreamed the game a few times and its funny going back to watch it.

The first time I entered the game, I was a little confused about the tutorial, but once I got into the room where the ghost was behind the fence, I was able to understand what each item was for and how to use it. I tried each one on the ghost but wasn’t sure if they were working or supposed to work. I ended up leaving the room and didn’t know where to end the tutorial, but later realized it was in another room on a wall.

My first try in multiplayer, I went back to the room with the computer and the phone ringing. My friend gave me a code to join, but nothing happened. They made the room public, and I had to spam the join button before I finally got in. I was so ready to start and couldn’t wait! I still wasn’t sure what I needed when we got there, but I had a lot of laughs and a lot of screams…lol.

At one point, the ghost got me, and I wasn’t sure if I died because I looked over and saw the ghost with her hand out like she had someone by the throat, but there was nothing in her hands. I asked if I was dead, and my friend laughed and said, “Yep, you’re on the floor.” Even though I was dead, I could walk around and still talk to my friends, which was nice. Usually when someone dies in a game, they are no longer in it, or we can’t hear them. I did notice that my flashlight was gone, which made sense, but the rooms were so dark it was hard to follow my friends or walk around.

Also, doors wouldn’t stay open and slammed shut on the next person entering.

All in all, I really enjoyed this game. We laughed, and I mostly screamed. There were a few times I worried my neighbor thought I was crazy because I kept yelling “ghost! ” Excellent game, and it’s great to have a game like this for the Quest.

developer_response.body: join our discord to check out the training video. that will help you out. by the way this is a most fun experience with friends. lol!

reviews.review_title: A True Test of Your Skills
reviews.review_description: Forget short experiences; this game has serious depth. The core loop of investigating haunted locations, gathering evidence, and performing exorcisms is incredibly engaging and, more importantly, highly repeatable. With multiple difficulty settings and randomly generated ghost behaviors, no two contracts are the same. It's the kind of game you can sink dozens of hours into and still feel challenged.

reviews.review_description: The sense of progression here is fantastic. Starting as a rookie and slowly leveling up to become a master exorcist is deeply satisfying. Gaining new levels unlocks access to better gear and more dangerous contracts. Seeing your character grow stronger and take on previously impossible challenges provides a constant and rewarding gameplay loop that keeps you coming back for "one more job."

developer_response.body: Yeah. this game was not one time shot. It deserve your time to deep dive.

reviews.review_description: This game boasts an incredible variety of gear. My inventory is always full of different spirit traps, upgraded EMF readers, protective relics, and unique consumables. What's great is that each new item feels meaningful, offering a new tactical advantage against the many types of ghosts. The sheer number of tools to collect and experiment with makes every investigation feel fresh and adaptable.

developer_response.body: Yeah. we have 20+ exorcism tools. This is a full pack deep dive experience.

reviews.review_description:
For starters, this is not a fast-paced game however, do not be mistaken, when something frightening happens, and rest assured it will, it tends to happen very quickly and with little warning. It has a detective slash escape room type vibe with the occasional scream at the top of your lungs so loud the neighbors hear you feel to it. if you're looking for a game to get immersed into and are willing to put in the work to learn the ropes of becoming an exorcist, this game is most definitely for you.

The developers have put a lot of thought and creative angles into this game and in addition, are very proactive on DIscord and not only happy, but reaching out to answer any of your questions.

reviews.review_description:
I actually really like the concept of the game overall and the way the pull it off in vr is great, but I have a few issues. 
A) the lighting is the best with the light and theres no way to fix it and the light switches doesnt add any extra lighting.
B) I miss the book method where you could put evidence in the book and it mark off certain ghosts that dont experience that trait, but the way its Pad system works is not bad and doesn’t bother me at all. 
C)the visuals have some glitches, i could see a doll on the floor in front of me that my teammates couldn’t see. I also saw the ghost differently than my team did, when it was a crawling ghost for me, the ghost would be standing and have different clothing for my friends. 
And finally D) the doors kept closing and shutting constantly every playthrough almost as if it was automatic so i couldnt determine whther it was the ghost or the game, everytime in every playthrough, the door would close behind me and then open on its own, EVERY DOOR keep in mind. But overall a great game and would love to see more content with js a couple fixed bugs

developer_response.body:
a. The light switches can slightly improve lighting, but not significantly, as we aim to maintain an overall dark and eerie atmosphere.  
c. This is the first time we’ve heard about this bug. I’d like to ensure that everyone’s game version is updated to the latest version 1.2.3 to rule out any issues caused by version differences.  
d. The doors are not designed to open and close automatically. What you experienced might be caused by multiple clicks from the previous player, leading to rapid open-close cycles. We can add a cooldown between door interactions to improve the overall experience.  

Thank you for your detailed feedback! We hope you and your friends continue to enjoy sharing the thrill of exorcising ghosts together. The game is still under development, and throughout 2025, we’ll be releasing more exciting content from Q1 to Q4. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_title: Attempting My Reservation… Wish Me Luck!
reviews.review_description: I'm trying out the booking system and hope to successfully complete my reservation—feeling a little excited!

Scary and has a good sense of teamwork. Issue is there's not much lobbies to join and none of my friends play this. And I want to join lobby's because I hate being alone. And also at some point when I made a lobby and someone left and made the game crash. Could be just me but I'm not sure. And also there is a relatively big crack of the void in one of the walls that was not filled in tutorial. Kind of ruins the feeling of being in an office. Also the van back door isn't working for me. Not sure if anyone else but it just does not work. Refuses to open is the issue but the thingy is fine.

developer_response.body: We have double checked. The van back door in single player start scene is by design change to can not open (since no need to open there).  After join in the map either single player mode or multiplayer mode. the van back door can open. In case you still have this issue pls join our discord and feedback there. The Tutorial room one wall missing collider have been fixed. tks for raise this and happy hunting!  regarding the lobbies. We see more and more player is join in our game. Also we will release some appointment mechnisim on Q1 2025. so player can eaiser to match making on future.

reviews.review_description:
Version 1.1.0 Release: New Exorcism Experience Awaits!

Hunters, get ready for the biggest update yet! Version 1.1.0 introduces all-new exorcism experiences designed to challenge and thrill you:

New Spirits and Demons: Face never-before-seen entities that require new strategies to defeat.
Expanded Locations: Explore eerie, uncharted territories filled with dark secrets and dangerous foes.
Advanced Combat Mechanics: Improved gear and abilities give you new ways to take down powerful spirits.
Enhanced Multiplayer Co-op: Team up with friends in more intense, coordinated battles.
This update takes Exorcism Agency to a new level. Ready for the hunt? Download version 1.1.0 in coming week!
I am gonna get a refund since it's hard to find people in publics but if a solo horror game is kinda your thing, than get it

* The toolbelt where you store items to carry is not anchored to the character model. When you turn on the spot, the toolbelt does not rotate, meaning your items end up behind you, which is a bit awkward.
UPDATE 13.10.24 - THIS ISSUE IS NOW FIXED! YEY!
*Asylum bug where the ghost is constantly hunting and gets stuck in the door. At this point, you can safely explore even though the ghost is hunting and will never actually kill you.
*Twin Villas bug. Some furniture is actually climbable, and in 2 of the rooms, you can climb on a sofa, and the ghost just ignores you. If you move too far back off the sofa, you end up in a corner and become stuck as there is no *angle* to climb back on the sofa, forcing you to quit the game.
*Tutorial can be quite vague on some mechanics.
*Buying items before entering a mission needs highlighting better. Took me several games to realise you can buy tools while in the lobby before starting a game.
*Better organisation of tools. Can we please separate tools by category in the van. Eg, excorcism tools all together and clue gathering tools all together.
*The clues in the mission that help identify the cause of death are so vague and don't make much sense at all, so this part becomes a guessing game. Need better clues.
*Need more tools to fend off ghost attacks WITHOUT it counting towards an incorrect excorcism! 
*Sometimes, the ghost spawns right on top of you, resulting in instant death even if holding a crucifix. Seems unfair.

Apart from the above, I have grown to really like this game, and I'm sure that with further development, it will become the go-to ghost hunting game.

developer_response.body: Very useful feedback. We will considering on this list.

reviews.review_description: Add smooth turn and polish it up good to go

developer_response.body: Tks buddy. We will release a new version within Nov 1st week. Smooth turn setting will be there.

reviews.review_description: Right off the bat the game needs option menu and smooth turning.  Having snap turn is horrible. It throws off your sense of direction and it’s just bad. I play seated so it’s worse cause I can’t turn with body.   Game is really dark also our side of your flashlight zone.   Game had good sense of horror.   Just needs smooth turning immediately

developer_response.body: you will see it on coming release version. best regard

reviews.review_title: Exorcism Agency is a Rising Gem
reviews.review_description:
Exorcism Agency is an "Early Access/App Lab" gaming experience. Please keep this and your expectations in mind as you play. 

 Exorcism Agency is similar to another game out there but built as a VR experience. What the devs have here is a rising gem of a game! With tools to use, clues to hear and look out for, you are sent to uncover the ghost/entity and exorcise them in a horror atmospheric setting. Solo and co-op play are both offered to enhance your experience. It's best played in a group in my opinion. One thing I'd like to see is that the lighting will change in the future as it's currently pitch black outside the flashlight you have to use. I get it supposed to be dark, but even at night, a house with windows isn't pitch black. Great work so far Devs! Looking forward to seeing what the future brings for this game!

developer_response.body: Appreciate this recommendation. we will considering enhance the light as well. and one good news is 1.0.6 version just landed. feel free to experience it with your friends.

reviews.review_title: Wow my friend hates it but I love it
reviews.review_description: This game is a must try constantly getting new updates and improvements the graphics are pretty good the games multiplayer runs perfect but there is a glitch some ghosts don't show up on the input overall if I could I would rate 4.5/5

developer_response.body: tks. we will solving this glitch and keep updating!

reviews.review_description: I love this game it’s like the quest 2 and 3 version of phasmophobia! Amazing game definitely worth the price and totally recommend this game even though there’s like nobody playing the game

I got it as soon as I saw a video from a YouTuber and reminds me of Inverse and kind of Ghostbusters. So far I've just completed the tutorial but don't really understand how the cameras work! The mannequins are like ghosts? Do you have a discord? Thanks!

developer_response.body: yeah. we are working hard on that!  Here is our discord link. https://discord.com/invite/XTQSvRyuNs . we will also update this info in our page.

reviews.review_title: Early days but could be great!
reviews.review_description:
Video playtest here (remove the space before "be" in the address):

https://youtu. be/V0mjJhowK7s?si=VRJPcDjV3UWbWz7t

Exorcism Agency is still in Early Access so there are a few creases to iron out, but it has good potential and the wealth of gadgets you can use in your investigations should make things very interesting once the game expands a bit! Oh, and the ghosts are scary too!

developer_response.body: This is what we are targeting for. We will keep providing update on that through our Hot update channel.

reviews.review_description:
The Movement is so disorienting. Needs Smooth turning. Snap turning just feels terrible.

Opening doors should be more immersive, instead of clicking to open, just grab the handle, then Push or grab.

Graphics needs to improve, looks like a quest 1 title. Understandably it's on early access but I definitely would love for this experience to improve. Great concept and we need more games like this in a standalone Headset.

On my previous review, there was an incompatibility bug with Quest 3 which prevented me from playing the way it was intended.

The devs have been super quick to fix that.

Now that I have played the app on quest 2 and 3, I am in a better position to offer a review.

The current content feels very early in. It is a work in progress and it has the potential to be pretty fun. Right now, it is a bit hard to experiment because the spirit shows itself very quickly and is extremely aggressive. I would prefer more build up, more tension and hopefully more opportunity to work with friends.

Phasmophobia has a basic description of what you're going to investigate and suggests that the spirit prefers to talk to groups or people alone. It forces a kind of dynamic that can be fun (leaving someone behind).

I'm sure it will keep improving and my review will be updated every time I play a new build.

Join their discord. The dev interacting with the community is really nice.

It's still in Early Access, but the levels and design are great.

I would love to see smooth turning implemented as it would help to improve the experience.  As of now, there is no way to change any movement options.

Also, the in-game text translation isn't the best.  I see some text that has ChatGPT written before.

I love where the game is heading.  And with a few additions, this will be great fun!
